question_text: Curve x=5cos t, y=3sin(2t), 0<=t<=pi/2. Find t at O and P. Show volume about x-axis is pi int_0^(pi/2) 180 sin^3(t)cos^2(t) dt, then find volume using u=cos t.

let u=cos t, du/dt=-sin t, limits t=0 -> u=1 and t=pi/2 -> u=0
notes: diagram only identifies O/P; deterministic parametric volume integral
